page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.6xlarge is a high-frequency general-purpose instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 24 dedicated Intel Xeon 6462C physical cores operating at a base frequency of 3.3 GHz. With a 1:1 ratio of vCPUs to physical cores and one thread per core, this instance provides dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead, ensuring consistent execution performance.

The instance is equipped with 96.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or onboard GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by an 18 Gbps baseline bandwidth, facilitating efficient data transfer for distributed workloads.

This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring high single-threaded performance and dedicated CPU execution, avoiding the resource contention typical of shared-core or hyperthreaded environments. The lack of local storage requires architectural planning for network-attached storage latency. The instance is suitable for general-purpose applications, high-frequency web serving, build systems, and medium-scale database hosting.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.6xlarge is a general-purpose, high-frequency instance featuring 24 dedicated Intel Xeon 6462C physical cores running at 3.3 GHz on an x86_64 architecture. With a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, it delivers dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. The instance is configured with 96.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core, and features an 18 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage. This configuration is well-suited for workloads requiring consistent CPU performance and a balanced memory-to-core ratio, such as application servers, build systems, and database hosting.
